_comment: Plan G — PRL 2008 ER plasma reproduction. Reuses existing ERPotential force class (forces/er_potential.py, anisotropic Yukawa V = α[exp(-r/λ)/r - 0.43·MT²·λ²·(3cos²θ-1)/r³]). Macro units (mm, ms, K). Verified against legacy ER_Sim_MT12 output at frame 50000 (chain spacing r≈0.21mm = 4.3λ, g_∥(r) dominant, g_⊥(r) flat). Sweep MT to capture chain-formation phase transition. Run length 50000 steps to avoid late-time instability seen at frame 99999 of legacy run.

campaign.notes: Plan G 1/5 — MT=0 baseline (isotropic Yukawa). NO chain formation expected. Control.
Plan G 2/5 — weak anisotropy. Expect mild chain tendency.
Plan G 3/5 — moderate. Expect partial chain formation.
Plan G 4/5 — same as legacy ER_Sim_MT12 (validation). Expect strong chains.
Plan G 5/5 — sonic limit. Expect strongest chains, possibly wider perpendicular spacing.
